positive: A minimalistic, stylized celestial wanderer silhouette, featuring a stylized crescent moon, scattered nebula particles, and constellations rendered in vibrant, ethereal sapphire and gold ink on a deep midnight navy background. The design should be highly symmetrical and centered, with fine, engraved line work giving it an Art Deco, mystical scientific blueprint aesthetic. Excellent contrast, solid color fields mixed with glowing line work. Suitable for screen printing on apparel. Vector-style quality, high detail, perfect symmetry, clean lines.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, dirty, grainy, low resolution, poor anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, noise, smudge
